notes: v0.0.4. Significant engine update: demand-paging VFS with BlockOffsetMap, header-first boot, OPFS auto-cache, .q42.bidx block-range index, sort-first ingestor, RAM bench, health console, CI/CD gates. Full docs overhaul — all pages now live-connected to the native daemon at localhost:4242 (no mock data). Windows binaries included directly; macOS and Linux binaries are built by the release workflow when a v* tag is pushed.
